_meta.purpose: Real-corpus probe for epistemology v0.3.0-pre.1 naturalization_fallacy detector
_meta.deviation_from_prereg: RU live-corpus positives sparse (vc.ru opinion piece deleted; mainstream Russian outlets either paywalled or did not surface clean naturalization framing in queries). Added 3 synthesis-canonical RU samples (clearly tagged). EN-heavy positive class compared to original 6-8/6-8 target.

entries.text: It's always been this way, folks. And it's not just democracy — no form of government is perfect or immune to tyranny.
entries.notes: explicit «always been this way» + suppression-of-reform framing

entries.text: It's a major reason why our Founders did not believe in democracy. The majority has eternally usurped over the rights of minorities.
entries.notes: «eternally usurped» — eternalist claim but lexical marker «eternally» NOT in detector pattern list

entries.text: Humans are inherently selfish and treacherous, like laws of nature that cannot be changed.
entries.notes: «inherently» (inherent in/to) + «laws of nature that cannot be changed» — marks both in detector

entries.text: History demonstrates humans are naturally prone to knavery throughout history.
Society fundamentally operates on individual greed across all systems and across human nature.
Humankind's covetousness is boundless. Its selfishness appears to be genetically inborn.
entries.notes: «genetically inborn» = naturalization but lexical phrasing not in detector

entries.text: For this can be said of men in general: that they are ungrateful, fickle, hypocrites — it has always been this way.
Civilization's morality is merely a thin veneer easily cracked to expose warlike instincts inherent in humans.
Remove civilization's basics and humans revert to Hobbesian warfare within hours — it is human nature.
Humans are flawed and incapable of reaching a state of perfection — this is the conservative view of human nature.
Society is naturally hierarchical, based on fixed social ranks and inequalities throughout history.
Коррупция в России — это просто человеческая природа, нельзя изменить, всегда так было.
entries.notes: synthesis: canonical RU naturalization with 3 detector markers

entries.text: Бюрократия в нашей стране существует испокон веков, такова природа человека.
Жадность сильнее закона во все времена — это вечная проблема человеческого общества.
entries.notes: synthesis: «во все времена» + «вечная проблема» — 2 detector markers

entries.text: Так устроен мир: одни управляют, другие подчиняются — этого не побороть.
entries.notes: synthesis: «так устроен мир» + «не побороть» — 2 detector markers

entries.text: OECD members enjoyed real GDP growth averaging over 4% per year in the 1950s, and nearly 5% per year in the 1960s, compared with 3% in the 1970s and 2% in the 1980s.
Between 1947 and 1973, France experienced average annual growth of approximately 5%, a period labeled the Trente Glorieuses by economist Jean Fourastié.
In the 1950s and early 1960s the Italian economy boomed, with record high growth-rates, including 6.4% in 1959, 5.8% in 1960, 6.8% in 1961, and 6.1% in 1962.
During the post-1950 recovery period, Japan achieved the world's fastest growth rates, propelled by manufacturing sectors and the Korean War demand for supplies.
Unemployment was significantly lower during the Golden Age than before or after, with UK figures showing 1.6% unemployment during 1950–1969 versus 13.4% in the pre-war 1921–1938 period.
Following the economic collapse of the early 1990s, Russia suffered from a sharp increase in the rates of poverty and economic inequality.
By mid-1993 between 39% and 49% of the population was living in poverty, compared with 1.5% in the late Soviet era.
Переломным периодом в истории России в Новое время принято считать рубеж XVII и XVIII столетий.
В 1767 году для выработки нового свода законов была созвана Уложенная комиссия.
20 февраля 1803 года вышел указ о вольных хлебопашцах, позволявший помещикам освобождать своих крепостных.
18 марта 1818 года в Варшаве при открытии работы первого польского парламента Александр I произнёс речь о распространении конституционных начал.
После поражения восстания на Сенатской площади для следующего российского императора, Николая I, сама идея какого-либо ограничения самодержавной власти была неприемлема.
